name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
eligibility: All fishermen, fish farmers, SHGs, cooperatives, and entrepreneurs in the fisheries sector. Both marine and inland fishers are eligible.
benefit: Subsidy of 40-60% on purchase of fishing boats, nets, and equipment. Financial assistance up to Rs 3 lakh for individual fishers and up to Rs 20 lakh for groups/cooperatives.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state fisheries department office or online at pmmsy.dof.gov.in with Aadhaar, fisherman ID card, and bank account details.

name: FIDF - Fisheries Infrastructure Development Fund
eligibility: State governments, cooperatives, and registered fish processing companies with valid licences.
benefit: Concessional loan at 5% interest rate for up to 12 years for building fish landing centres, cold storage units, ice plants, and fish processing facilities.
how_to_apply: Apply through NABARD or scheduled commercial banks with a detailed project report. Contact the nearest NABARD district office or state fisheries department.

name: Kerala Fisheries Department Accident Insurance Scheme
eligibility: All active fishermen registered with the Kerala Fisheries Department who hold a valid fisherman identity card.
benefit: Rs 5 lakh compensation for accidental death at sea. Rs 2 lakh for permanent disability. Rs 50,000 for partial disability. Free treatment at government hospitals for injuries.
how_to_apply: Register at the nearest fisheries extension office with your fisherman ID card and Aadhaar. In case of a claim, contact the district fisheries officer within 30 days of the accident.

name: Diesel Subsidy Scheme for Fishermen
eligibility: Registered fishermen owning mechanised or motorised fishing boats with a valid Kerala fisherman identity card and boat registration certificate.
benefit: Subsidy of Rs 2.50 per litre on diesel purchased for fishing vessels. Annual limit of 4,000 litres per boat. Credited directly to the fisherman's bank account (DBT).
how_to_apply: Register your boat and Aadhaar-linked bank account at the district fisheries office. Obtain a diesel smart card and fill diesel at authorised bunks to automatically receive the subsidy via DBT.
